name: obsidian-wiki
description: Maintain an Obsidian LLM-Wiki (structure layer + content curation + orchestrator).
skillInstructions:
Kimi Code tool mapping for obsidian-wiki skills:
- When a skill says to ask the user, present options, or confirm before a destructive action, call Kimi Code's `AskUserQuestion` tool.
- Use Kimi Code's `Read`, `Write`, `Edit`, `Bash`, `Grep`, `Glob` and MCP tools by their exposed names. Never touch read-only content dirs; never rewrite wiki-struct managed blocks outside the struct skill.
